instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Six Unexpected ways Life Insurance can help protect your Family’s Future
If you have decided to buy life insurance, then you understand that it is one means to provide financial protection to your family. There are various types of life insurance policies to choose from, all with a common objective to protect your family and their future. Here are some unexpected ways in which life insurance can protect your family.
Alignment to your financial goals:There is a wide variety of life insurance plans available today. The best life insurance policy is one that aligns well with your requirement. Some of the financial goals can be partially planned with life insurance policies as well. For example, a need like a children's education plan can be planned using a child plan or money-back plans offering intermediate payouts per the child’s milestone. It also offers life coverage for the parent, thereby ensuring that this need is taken care of even upon your untimely demise.
Corpus for retirement:Life insurance policies which are not pure term insurance policies, accrue cash value. This can be aligned with your retirement. The corpus you receive on maturity can be reinvested in any other conventional avenue to cater to your retirement corpus requirement. Even within the term insurance scheme, you have the return of premium option, which enables you to get back the premiums at the end of the policy tenure. This corpus can also contribute to your retirement plan.
Loan against the policy during financial distress:During times of financial distress, you can seek a loan against your life insurance policy. Any policy accrues cash surrender value will be allowed a loan against the policy. This falls within the realm of secured loans. With a good credit score, you can negotiate favourable interest rates. You can avail yourself of anywhere between 80% - 90% of the cash surrender value as a loan. Until the policy is held against the loan, there will be no intermediate payouts; however, the life cover will continue.
Partial withdrawals during needy times:Apart from term life insurance, all other types of life insurance which accrue a cash surrender value allow partial withdrawals without closure or termination of the policy. This can come in handy during troubled waters. In case you are unable to pay the premiums, you can opt for the feature where the premium cost is deducted from the cash surrender value itself. This feature will ensure that you continue to avail yourself the life risk coverage.
Contribute to your peace of mind:Availing of life insurance takes a huge burden off your shoulder. You are assured that your family and their financial needs will be adequately taken care of if your untimely death. This thought contributes to your mental peace and facilitates better engagement with your work and personal life.
Comprehensive coverage with riders:Life insurance riders offer comprehensive coverage. They ensure to cement the multiple gaps that are not covered by the basic life insurance policy. Some of the life insurance riders who contribute to such enhanced cover are:
Critical illness and disability covers increase the size of your coverage. Both these triggering events in your life are likely to create a dent in your finances and increase your financial burden. Hence, availing of them would help you cover these increasingly common threats.
AD (Accidental death benefit rider) is yet another rider which enhances the coverage to cover any unforeseen accidental death. It works well, especially for individuals who are predominantly on the road and have a relatively high likelihood of accidental death.
These are some of how life insurance protects your family. Your effort toward financial planning will be incomplete if you have not considered availing yourself of adequate life coverage. While pure term insurance serves the basic purpose, you should consider exploring other options which offer additional benefits and align with your specific financial goals.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789

output.final_text:
Six Unexpected ways Life Insurance can help protect your Family’s Financial Future If you have decided to buy life insurance, then you understand that it aims to provide financial protection to your family. There are various types of life insurance plans to choose from, all with a common objective to protect your family financially and their financial future. Here are some unexpected ways in which life insurance can protect your family financially.
1. Alignment to your financial goals:
There is a wide variety of life insurance plans available today. The suitable life insurance plan is one that aligns well with your requirement. Some of the financial goals can be planned with life insurance policies as well. For example, a need like a children's education plan can be planned using a child plan or money- back plans offering intermediate payouts per the child’s milestone. It also offers life coverage for the parent, thereby ensuring that this financial need is taken care of even upon your untimely demise.
2. Corpus for retirement:
Life insurance plans which are not pure protection insurance plans, provides survival or maturity benefit. This can be aligned with your retirement. The corpus you receive on maturity can be reinvested in any other conventional avenue to cater to your retirement corpus requirement.
3. Loan against the policy during financial distress:
During times of financial distress, you can seek a loan against your life insurance policy. Policies that accrue cash surrender value will be allowed a loan against the policy subject to policy terms and conditions. This falls within the realm of secured loans. You can avail yourself of anywhere between 80% - 90%1 of the cash surrender value of the life insurance plan as a loan depending on the terms and conditions mentioned in the policy. 4. Partial withdrawals during needy times:
Unit Linked life insurance plans allow partial withdrawals without closure or termination of the policy. This can come in handy during troubled waters. According to the new rules of partial withdrawal, a policyholder is allowed to partially withdraw up to 25% of the fund value in the entire policy tenure without discontinuing the plan wherein the withdrawal is linked to any major life event such as child’s marriage or higher education purposes or other events such as any critical ailment or buying or building a new property2. 5. Contribute to your peace of mind:
Availing of life insurance takes a huge burden off your shoulder. You are assured that your family and their financial needs will be adequately taken care of in case of your untimely death provided all due premiums are paid. This thought contributes to your mental peace and facilitates better engagement with your work and personal life.
6. Comprehensive coverage with riders:
Life insurance riders offer comprehensive coverage. They ensure to cement the multiple gaps that are not covered by the basic life insurance policy at nominal extra cost. Some of the life insurance riders which contribute to such enhanced cover are:
a. Critical illness and disability covers increase the size of your coverage. Both these
triggering events in your life are likely to create a dent in your finances and increase your financial burden. Hence, availing of them would help you cover these increasingly common threats. b. AD (Accidental death benefit rider) is yet another rider which enhances the coverage to
cover any unforeseen accidental death. These are some of how life insurance protects your family financially. Your effort toward financial planning can be incomplete if you have not considered availing yourself of adequate life coverage. While pure term insurance serves the basic purpose, you should consider exploring other options which offer additional benefits and align with your specific financial goals. Source 1https://www.valueresearchonline.com/stories/51033/what-happens-on-surrendering-an-lic-policy- against-which-you-have-availed-a-loan 2https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/wealth/insure/life-insurance/partial-withdrawal-from-life- insurance-policy-reduces-sum-assured/articleshow/74457926.cms Disclaimer In this policy, the investment risk in investment portfolio is borne by the policyholder. Investment in ULIPs is subject to risks associated with the capital markets. The policy holder is solely responsible for his/her decisions while investing in ULIPs.The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
